wellclad.name: Well Clad
wellclad.description: Increases the Defense of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

robust.name: Robust
robust.description: Increases the Health of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

swift.name: Swift
swift.description: Increases the March Speed of the wielder's troop by 2.5%.

payback.name: Payback
payback.description: The wielder's troop deals 7.5% extra damage to barbarians.

onslaught.name: Onslaught
onslaught.description: The wielder's troop deals 1.5% more normal damage of all types.

retaliatory.name: Retaliatory
retaliatory.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more counterattack damage of all types.

enraged.name: Enraged
enraged.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more skill damage of all types and 1% more counterattack damage of all types.

valiant.name: Valiant
valiant.description: The wielder's troop deals 1% extra damage.

ironwall.name: Iron Wall
ironwall.description: The wielder's troop takes 1.5% less normal damage of all types.

bellicose.name: Bellicose
bellicose.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches any type of basic attack, it has a 10% chance to gain a 5% bonus to damage dealt for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

pulverize.name: Pulverize
pulverize.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches any type of basic attack, it has a 10% chance to gain a 20% bonus to all types of normal damage dealt for 1 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

breaker.name: Breaker
breaker.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches any type of basic attack, it has a 10% chance to reduce the target's Defense by 15% for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

furious.name: Furious
furious.description: Whenever the wielder's troop uses an active skill, it gains a 8% bonus to all types of skill damage dealt and a 3% bonus to all types of counterattack damage dealt for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

ward.name: Ward
ward.description: Whenever the wielder uses an active skill, their troop takes 5% less damage for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

phalanx.name: Phalanx
phalanx.description: Whenever the wielder uses an active skill, their troop has a 30% chance to gain a shield (Damage Factor 100) for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

hurried.name: Hurried
hurried.description: The wielder's troop gains a 15% bonus to March Speed for 10 seconds after leaving battle.

tremors.name: Tremors
tremors.description: Whenever the wielder's troop uses an active skill, it has a 30% chance to deal extra direct damage/ranged direct damage to all targets hit by the skill (Damage Factor 100). Cooldown: 5 seconds.

calm.name: Calm
calm.description: Whenever the wielder's troop uses an active skill, it has a 30% chance to gain a 10% bonus to Attack for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

loosed.name: Loosed
loosed.description: While in V formation, whenever the wielder's troop launches a ranged basic attack it has a 10% chance to deal extra ranged direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 200). Cooldown: 5 seconds. While not in V formation, the wielder's troop takes 1% less normal damage of all types.

armored.name: Armored
armored.description: Increases the Defense of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

fit.name: Fit
fit.description: Increases the Health of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

finehorse.name: Fine Horse
finehorse.description: Increases the March Speed of the wielder's troop by 2.5%.

annexer.name: Annexer
annexer.description: The wielder's troop deals 7.5% extra damage to barbarians.

warhunger.name: Warhunger
warhunger.description: The wielder's troop deals 1.5% more normal damage of all types.

alert.name: Alert
alert.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more counterattack damage of all types.

devious.name: Devious
devious.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more skill damage of all types and 1% more counterattack damage of all types.

fearsome.name: Fearsome
fearsome.description: The wielder's troop deals 1% extra damage.

evasive.name: Evasive
evasive.description: The wielder's troop takes 2.5% less counterattack damage of all types.

requital.name: Requital
requital.description: Whenever the wielder's troop is hit with any type of basic attack, it has a 10% chance to deal additional damage to the attacker every second for 2 seconds (Damage Factor 50). Cooldown: 5 seconds.

respite.name: Respite
respite.description: Whenever the wielder's troop is hit with any type of basic attack, it has a 10% chance to take 10% less damage for the next 2 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

guarded.name: Guarded
guarded.description: Whenever the wielder's troop takes skill/combo attack/smite damage of any type, it has a 10% chance to reduce the damage by 20%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

embattled.name: Embattled
embattled.description: Whenever the wielder's troop takes skill/combo attack/smite damage of any type, it has a 10% chance to gain 50 Rage. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

vengeful.name: Vengeful
vengeful.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches any type of basic attack, it gains an extra 2 Rage for every 10% of its units it has lost (up to 10 Rage).

patronage.name: Patronage
patronage.description: Whenever the wielder's troop receives healing or a shield, it deals 2% extra damage for the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

primed.name: Primed
primed.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% bonus to March Speed when it has over 50% units remaining.

uplifting.name: Uplifting
uplifting.description: When it enters a battle, the wielder's troop gains a 1% bonus to all types of normal damage dealt. Every 10 seconds after the start of the battle, their troop gains an extra 1% bonus to all types of normal damage dealt (up to 5%).

spirited.name: Spirited
spirited.description: The wielder's troop deals 5% extra damage when it has over 70% Rage.

bluster.name: Bluster
bluster.description: Whenever the wielder's troop is inflicted with a control effect, it has a 10% chance to negate the effect and deal direct damage to 3 nearby enemy troops (Damage Factor 100). Damage dealt to each target is reduced by 15% for each additional target. This damage effect has a cooldown of 5 seconds.

metallics.name: Metallics
metallics.description: Increases the Defense of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

vitality.name: Vitality
vitality.description: Increases the Health of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

galloping.name: Galloping
galloping.description: Increases the March Speed of the wielder's troop by 2.5%.

cleanser.name: Cleanser
cleanser.description: The wielder's troop deals 7.5% extra damage to barbarians.

striker.name: Striker
striker.description: The wielder's troop deals 1.5% more normal damage of all types.

rebuff.name: Rebuff
rebuff.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more counterattack damage of all types.

brawler.name: Brawler
brawler.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more skill damage of all types and 1% more counterattack damage of all types.

warflames.name: Warflames
warflames.description: The wielder's troop deals 1% extra damage.

eclipsed.name: Eclipsed
eclipsed.description: The wielder's troop takes 2.5% less skill/combo attack/smite damage of all types.

brave.name: Brave
brave.description: While surrounded, the wielder's troop deals 5% more counterattack damage of all types.

strategic.name: Strategic
strategic.description: The wielder's troop deals 2% extra damage to surrounded troops.

desperado.name: Desperado
desperado.description: The wielder's troop takes 2% less damage when it has under 50% units remaining.

cohesive.name: Cohesive
cohesive.description: The wielder's troop deals 2% extra damage when it has over 50% units remaining.

pursuer.name: Pursuer
pursuer.description: The wielder's troop deals 2% extra damage to troops with under 20% units remaining.

assertive.name: Assertive
assertive.description: The wielder's troop deals 2% more damage while on the map.

wary.name: Wary
wary.description: Increases the March Speed of the wielder's troop by 5% while outside of alliance territory.

siegework.name: Siegework
siegework.description: The wielder's troop deals 2% more damage when attacking a city or stronghold.

sentries.name: Sentries
sentries.description: The wielder's troop takes 2% less damage while garrisoned.

ballistics.name: Ballistics
ballistics.description: While in V formation and in ranged mode, the wielder's troop deals 3% more damage. While not in V formation, the wielder's troop deals 1.5% more counterattack damage of all types.

shielded.name: Shielded
shielded.description: Increases the Defense of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

hardy.name: Hardy
hardy.description: Increases the Health of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

haste.name: Haste
haste.description: Increases the March Speed of the wielder's troop by 2.5%.

pacifier.name: Pacifier
pacifier.description: The wielder's troop deals 7.5% extra damage to barbarians.

militant.name: Militant
militant.description: The wielder's troop deals 1.5% more normal damage of all types.

resistant.name: Resistant
resistant.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more counterattack damage of all types.

daring.name: Daring
daring.description: The wielder's troop deals 2.5% more skill damage of all types and 1% more counterattack damage of all types.

elite.name: Elite
elite.description: The wielder's troop deals 1% extra damage.

smite.name: Smite
smite.description: The wielder's troop deals 2% more normal damage of all types.

enduring.name: Enduring
enduring.description: The wielder's troop deals 3% more counterattack damage of all types.

artisan.name: Artisan
artisan.description: The wielder's troop deals 3% more skill damage of all types and 1.5% more counterattack damage of all types.

rapacious.name: Rapacious
rapacious.description: The wielder's troop deals 1.5% extra damage.

guardians.name: Guardians
guardians.description: The wielder's troop takes 2% less normal damage of all types.

counterer.name: Counterer
counterer.description: The wielder's troop takes 3% less counterattack damage of all types.

deflecter.name: Deflecter
deflecter.description: The wielder's troop takes 3% less skill/combo attack/smite damage of all types.

watchmen.name: Watchmen
watchmen.description: The wielder's troop takes 1.5% less damage.

lineshot.name: Lineshot
lineshot.description: While in V formation, the wielder's troop deals 5% more ranged normal damage. While not in V formation, the wielder's troop deals 1% more normal damage of all types.

warcry.name: Warcry
warcry.description: Increases the Attack of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

brutal.name: Brutal
brutal.description: Increases the Attack of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

spiked.name: Spiked
spiked.description: Increases the Attack of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

infamy.name: Infamy
infamy.description: Increases the Attack of the wielder's troop by 3.5%.

destructive.name: Destructive
destructive.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3.5% boost to normal damage dealt. Whenever their troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to spend 100 Rage to increase the damage of the attack by 70%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

straighttothepoint.name: Straight to the point
straighttothepoint.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3.5% boost to normal damage dealt. Whenever their troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to gain a 20% bonus to normal damage dealt but a 10% reduction to skill damage dealt for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

invincible.name: Invincible
invincible.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 5%. For every 20% of its units a target troop has lost, the wielder's troop deals 3% more normal damage (up to 12%).

fearless.name: Fearless
fearless.description: The wielder's troop gains a 8% boost to normal damage dealt.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to skill damage dealt. When dealing direct damage to a single target, the damage is increased by 10%. Otherwise, it is increased by 2%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

unstoppable.name: Unstoppable
unstoppable.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to skill damage dealt. When dealing direct damage to a target, there is a 30% chance that the damage will be increased by 10%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

balanced.name: Balanced
balanced.description: Increases the normal damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 3.5%. Upon reaching 80% Rage, their troop deals 8% more skill damage for the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

intrepid.name: Intrepid
intrepid.description: The wielder's troop gains a 10% boost to skill damage dealt.

sharpshooter.name: Sharpshooter
sharpshooter.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to ranged normal damage dealt. Whenever their troop launches a ranged basic attack, it has a 10% chance to spend 50 Rage to increase the damage of the attack by 50%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

drilled.name: Drilled
drilled.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to ranged normal damage dealt. When attacking from range, for every 20% units the target has lost, the wielder's troop gains a 3% bonus to ranged normal damage dealt (up to a maximum of 12%).

merciless.name: Merciless
merciless.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 5%. Increases the Attack of the wielder's siege units by 30% for 10 seconds after entering battle.

astute.name: Astute
astute.description: The wielder's troop gains a 10% boost to ranged normal damage dealt.

influentialleader.name: Influential leader
influentialleader.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to Rage gain speed. Whenever their troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to increase the Attack of up to 3 nearby allied targets (not including itself) by 15% for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

loaded.name: Loaded
loaded.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 5%. Whenever it takes damage, their troop has a 10% chance to reduce the damage by 15% and gain a 20% bonus to March Speed for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

civilized.name: Civilized
civilized.description: The wearer's troop gains 5% counterattack damage resistance. Whenever their troop grants an allied troop a buff, extra Rage, or healing, the affected troop instantly gains 25 Rage. Can trigger once per second for each troop.

fixed.name: Fixed
fixed.description: Increases the normal damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 8%.

cocoon.name: Cocoon
cocoon.description: The wielder's troop gains 5% skill damage resistance. Whenever their troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to increase the strength of any shields it receives by 10% for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

inviolable.name: Inviolable
inviolable.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to all shields it creates. Their troop takes 10% less skill damage while it has a shield.

crowned.name: Crowned
crowned.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to all shields it creates. If their troop has a shield, it deals 3% more damage. If their troop does not have a shield, it instead deals 2% more damage.

rounded.name: Rounded
rounded.description: Increases the damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 5%.

rich.name: Rich
rich.description: Increases the Gold gathering speed of the wielder's troop by 25%.

battlements.name: Battlements
battlements.description: Reduces the number of severely wounded units in battle by 10%.

moneyed.name: Moneyed
moneyed.description: The wielder's troop receives an extra 7.5% resources after gathering.

transporter.name: Transporter
transporter.description: Increases the resource load of the wielder's troop by 25%.

enmeshed.name: Enmeshed
enmeshed.description: The wielder's active skills reduce the March Speed of their current target by 20% for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

logistical.name: Logistical
logistical.description: Increases the wielder's Unit Capacity by 5%.

unassailed.name: Unassailed
unassailed.description: The wielder's troop gains a 50% bonus to March Speed for 10 seconds when departing buildings.

winged.name: Winged
winged.description: Increases the March Speed of the wielder's troop by 10%.

irreproachable.name: Irreproachable
irreproachable.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3.5% boost to all shields it creates and all healing it receives. Whenever the wielder's troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to increase the strength of all shields and healing it receives within the next 3 seconds by 7%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

cautious.name: Cautious
cautious.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to counterattack damage dealt. Whenever their troop receives a shield or is healed, the strength of said shield/healing is increased by 7%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

shieldbash.name: Shield Bash
shieldbash.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 5%. Whenever their troop is healed or receives a shield, it gains a 3.5% bonus to damage dealt for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 8 seconds.

rocksolid.name: Rock Solid
rocksolid.description: The wielder's troop gains a 7% boost to all healing it receives and a 7% boost to all shields it creates.

avenger.name: Avenger
avenger.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to counterattack damage. Whenever their troop uses an active skill, any healing it receives within the next 3 seconds is increased by 10%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

guardinglight.name: Guarding light
guardinglight.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to all healing it receives. Whenever their troop takes damage, it has a 30% chance to increase all healing it receives within the next 3 seconds by 10%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

turnthecorner.name: Turn the corner
turnthecorner.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 5%. Whenever their troop is healed, it gains a 5% bonus to damage dealt for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 8 seconds.

panacea.name: Panacea
panacea.description: The wielder's troop gains a 10% boost to all healing it receives.

hastyretreat.name: Hasty Retreat
hastyretreat.description: The wielder's troop gains 50% March Speed while routed.

blastshield.name: Blast Shield
blastshield.description: When the wielder's troop takes skill damage from an AoE skill, the damage is reduced by 30%. Cooldown: 60 seconds (does not reset after exiting combat).

fullforce.name: Full Force
fullforce.description: Increases the wielder's Unit Capacity by 5%.

unitedfront.name: United Front
unitedfront.description: If the wielder's troop is in a rally or garrison but is not the captain, the wielder's troop gains 5% severe wound resistance.

thrasher.name: Thrasher
thrasher.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3.5% boost to combo attack damage dealt. Whenever their troop launches a combo attack, it gains a 1.5% bonus to combo attack damage dealt for 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

butterflyeffect.name: Butterfly effect
butterflyeffect.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3.5% boost to combo attack damage dealt. Combo attacks launched by their troop are 20% more likely to trigger effects triggered by launching a basic attack.

steelskin.name: Steelskin
steelskin.description: The wielder's troop gains 2% damage resistance. Whenever their troop launches a combo attack, it takes 1.5% less damage for the next 10 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

flurry.name: Flurry
flurry.description: The wielder's troop gains a 8% boost to combo attack damage dealt.

battleready.name: Battle Ready
battleready.description: The wielder's troop gains a 15% boost to counterattack damage dealt while garrisoned in your city.

fortified.name: Fortified
fortified.description: The wielder's troop gains 12.5% skill damage resistance, smite damage resistance, and combo attack damage resistance while garrisoned in your city.

chokepoint.name: Chokepoint
chokepoint.description: While garrisoned in your city and surrounded, the wielder's troop takes less damage (damage reduction = 4% x number of surrounding troops, up to 5 troops).

steelheart.name: Steelheart
steelheart.description: The wielder's troop gains 7% damage resistance while garrisoned in your city.

vanquisher.name: Vanquisher
vanquisher.description: The wielder's troop deals 40% more damage to Barbarian Troops.

selfheal.name: Self Heal
selfheal.description: Whenever the wielder's troop defeats a Barbarian Troop, it recovers a portion of its slightly wounded units (Healing Factor 1000).

brilliant.name: Brilliant
brilliant.description: The wielder's troop gains 25% extra EXP from defeating barbarians.

mountain.name: Mountain
mountain.description: The wielder's troop takes 30% less damage from Barbarian Troops.

toppler.name: Toppler
toppler.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to smite damage. Whenever their troop deals smite damage, the target troop takes 20% increased smite damage for the next 3 seconds. This effect can trigger multiple times in a single second (up to 5 times) before entering its cooldown. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

demolisher.name: Demolisher
demolisher.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to smite damage. Whenever their troop deals smite damage, it has a 75% chance to ignore 50% of the target's Defense. This effect can trigger multiple times in a single second (up to 5 times) before entering its cooldown. If it only triggers once, the wielder's troop gains 100 extra Rage. Cooldown: 10 seconds.

airtight.name: Airtight
airtight.description: The wielder's troop gains 5% combo attack damage resistance. Whenever their troop deals smite damage, their troop takes 10% less damage for the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

thundering.name: Thundering
thundering.description: The wielder's troop gains a 10% boost to smite damage dealt.

advantageadvanced.name: Advantage advanced
advantageadvanced.description: The wielder's troop gains a 7% boost to skill damage dealt. When the wielder's troop deals skill damage, it deals 10% more if the hit target has 50% or more units remaining. If not, the target takes 2.5% more damage for the next 2 seconds.

indomitable.name: Indomitable
indomitable.description: The wielder's troop gains a 7% boost to skill damage dealt. For every 300 Rage the wielder has, their troop deals 1% more damage and takes 1% less damage (for up to 5% more/less). This buff is applied when your primary commander uses a skill and lasts for 3 seconds at a fixed value, regardless of subsequent changes in Rage.

maneuveratease.name: Maneuver at ease
maneuveratease.description: The wielder's troop gains 2% damage resistance and 2% smite damage resistance. Within 5 seconds after using an active skill, for every 3 instances of basic attack/counterattack damage dealt, the next basic attack will have its damage converted into direct damage instead. The direct damage is equal to 150% of the troop's basic attack Damage Factor. Cooldown: 1 second.

horsebackaction.name: Horseback action
horsebackaction.description: The wielder's troop gains a 12.5% boost to skill damage dealt.

battleready_blue.name: Battle-Ready
battleready_blue.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to consume 100 Rage to gain a 35% bonus to normal damage dealt for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

evenkeeled.name: Even-Keeled
evenkeeled.description: The wielder's troop gains a 1.5% boost to normal damage dealt. Whenever their troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to reduce all incoming damage by 5% but also deal 10% less skill damage for the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

unswerving.name: Unswerving
unswerving.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 4%.

forceful.name: Forceful
forceful.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3% boost to normal damage dealt.

crazed.name: Crazed
crazed.description: Whenever the wielder's troop deals direct damage, it gains 35 Rage. Cooldown: 2 seconds.

boilingblood.name: Boiling Blood
boilingblood.description: The wielder's troop gains a 2% boost to skill damage dealt. Whenever the wielder's troop deals direct damage to its current target, their troop has a 30% chance to reduce all incoming skill damage by 5% for the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

defiant.name: Defiant
defiant.description: Increases the normal damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 3%.

focusfire.name: Focus Fire
focusfire.description: The wielder's troop gains a 4% boost to skill damage dealt.

fulldraw.name: Full Draw
fulldraw.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches a ranged basic attack, it has a 10% chance to consume 50 Rage to gain a 25% bonus to ranged normal damage dealt for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

bloodybolt.name: Bloody Bolt
bloodybolt.description: The wielder's troop gains a 2% boost to ranged normal damage dealt. While in ranged mode, their troop deals 5% more ranged normal damage to enemy troops with less than 50% units remaining.

tempered.name: Tempered
tempered.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 4%.

sharparrows.name: Sharp Arrows
sharparrows.description: The wielder's troop gains a 4% boost to ranged normal damage dealt.

drumsofwar.name: Drums of war
drumsofwar.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to grant up to 3 nearby allied troops (including itself) a 15% bonus to Attack for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

nullify.name: Nullify
nullify.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 2%. Whenever their troop takes damage, it has a 10% chance to reduce all incoming damage by 3% for the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

counterparry.name: Counter-Parry
counterparry.description: Increases the counterattack damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 4%.

persevering.name: Persevering
persevering.description: Increases the normal damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 3%.

selfdefense.name: Self-Defense
selfdefense.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches a basic attack, it has a 10% chance to increase the strength of any shields it creates within the next 4 seconds by 10%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

aegis.name: Aegis
aegis.description: The wielder's troop gains a 2% boost to all shields it creates. Their troop takes 5% less skill damage while it has a shield.

reinforced.name: Reinforced
reinforced.description: The wielder's troop gains a 4% boost to all shields it creates.

tenacious.name: Tenacious
tenacious.description: Increases the damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 2%.

goldpanner.name: Gold Panner
goldpanner.description: Increases the Gold gathering speed of the wielder's troop by 15%.

safeguard.name: Safeguard
safeguard.description: Reduces the number of severely wounded units in battle by 4%.

plentitude.name: Plentitude
plentitude.description: The wielder's troop receives an extra 3% resources after gathering.

sturdyback.name: Sturdy Back
sturdyback.description: Increases the resource load of the wielder's troop by 12%.

entangling.name: Entangling
entangling.description: The wielder's active skills reduce the March Speed of their current target by 10% for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

armsrace.name: Arms Race
armsrace.description: Increases the wielder's Unit Capacity by 2%.

sprinter.name: Sprinter
sprinter.description: The wielder's troop gains a 20% bonus to March Speed for 10 seconds when departing buildings.

strider.name: Strider
strider.description: Increases the March Speed of the wielder's troop by 5%.

ironclad.name: Ironclad
ironclad.description: Whenever the wielder's troop receives a shield or is healed, the strength of any shields or healing it receives within the next 3 seconds is increased by 5%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

strikeparry.name: Strike & parry
strikeparry.description: The wielder's troop gains a 2% boost to counterattack damage dealt. Whenever their troop receives a shield, it also receives a damage-absorbing Mighty Shield for 3 seconds (Damage Factor 150). Whenever their troop is healed, it is Mighty Healed for a portion of its slightly wounded units (Healing Factor 150). Both effects use the same cooldown: 5 seconds.

unshakeable.name: Unshakeable
unshakeable.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 4%.

convalescing.name: Convalescing
convalescing.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3% boost to all healing it receives and a 3% boost to all shields it creates.

backinaction.name: Back In Action
backinaction.description: Whenever the wielder's troop is healed, the strength of said healing is increased by 8%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

medic.name: Medic
medic.description: The wielder's troop gains a 2% boost to all healing it receives. Whenever their troop is healed, if it is healed again within the next 5 seconds, said healing is increased by 4%. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

riseup.name: Rise Up
riseup.description: Increases the skill damage resistance of the wielder's troop by 4%.

refreshing.name: Refreshing
refreshing.description: The wielder's troop gains a 4% boost to all healing it receives.

fallback.name: Fall Back
fallback.description: The wielder's troop gains 20% March Speed while routed.

spreadout.name: Spread Out
spreadout.description: When the wielder's troop takes skill damage from an AoE skill, the damage is reduced by 15%. Cooldown: 60 seconds (does not reset after exiting combat).

shocktroops.name: Shock Troops
shocktroops.description: Increases the wielder's Unit Capacity by 2%.

mutualdefense.name: Mutual Defense
mutualdefense.description: If the wielder's troop is in a rally or garrison but is not the captain, the wielder's troop gains 2% severe wound resistance.

pummeler.name: Pummeler
pummeler.description: Whenever the wielder's troop launches a combo attack, it has a 80% chance to gain a 10% bonus to combo attack damage dealt for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

causative.name: Causative
causative.description: The wielder's troop gains a 1.5% boost to combo attack damage dealt. Combo attacks launched by their troop are 8% more likely to trigger effects triggered by launching a basic attack.

determined.name: Determined
determined.description: The wielder's troop gains 1.5% damage resistance.

relentless.name: Relentless
relentless.description: The wielder's troop gains a 3.5% boost to combo attack damage dealt.

vigilant.name: Vigilant
vigilant.description: The wielder's troop gains a 6% boost to counterattack damage dealt while garrisoned in your city.

resolute.name: Resolute
resolute.description: The wielder's troop gains 5% skill damage resistance, smite damage resistance, and combo attack damage resistance while garrisoned in your city.

precautions.name: Precautions
precautions.description: While garrisoned in your city and surrounded, the wielder's troop takes less damage (damage reduction = 2% x number of surrounding troops, up to 4 troops).

ironsides.name: Ironsides
ironsides.description: The wielder's troop gains 3% damage resistance while garrisoned in your city.

overwhelm.name: Overwhelm
overwhelm.description: The wielder's troop deals 15% more damage to Barbarian Troops.

selftend.name: Self Tend
selftend.description: Whenever the wielder's troop defeats a Barbarian Troop, it recovers a portion of its slightly wounded units (Healing Factor 400).

stone.name: Stone
stone.description: The wielder's troop takes 12% less damage from Barbarian Troops.

imploder.name: Imploder
imploder.description: Whenever the wielder's troop deals smite damage, the target troop loses 20% Defense for the next 2 seconds. This effect can trigger multiple times in a single second (up to 3 times) before entering its cooldown. Cooldown: 5 seconds.

raider.name: Raider
raider.description: The wielder's troop gains a 2% boost to smite damage. Whenever their troop deals smite damage, it has a 50% chance to gain Rage 20% faster for the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds.

hardheaded.name: Hardheaded
hardheaded.description: The wielder's troop gains 4% combo attack damage resistance.

rattling.name: Rattling
rattling.description: The wielder's troop gains a 4% boost to smite damage dealt.

fury.name: Fury
fury.description: When the wielder's troop deals skill damage, it ignores 10% of the enemy troop's Defense. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per second. Cooldown: 2 seconds.

soar.name: Soar
soar.description: The wielder's troop gains a 2% skill damage boost. For every 600 Rage gained, the wielder's troop gains a 4% bonus to all damage dealt and 2% reduction to all damage taken for the next 3 seconds.

ballista.name: Ballista
ballista.description: The wielder's troop gains 1.5% damage resistance and 1.5% smite damage resistance.

divinestaff.name: Divine Staff
divinestaff.description: The wielder's troop gains a 5% boost to skill damage dealt.

astute_blue.name: Astute
astute_blue.description: The wielder's troop gains 10% extra EXP from defeating barbarians.
